notes: Wizard fixes and check_update gesture. (1) Firmware suppresses all mapped actions and volume/bass/treble rotation while setupComplete=false — clicks and turns during the install wizard no longer bleed through to the paired Sonos. (2) Wizard step 3 (volume test) now observes the encoder's rotationFine counter directly instead of Sonos vol-change, since actions are suppressed during setup. (3) One-page wizard: steps 1/2/3 all visible at once with cur/done/pending states; the press-to-begin ceremony is gone. (4) Speaker picker is names-only, tappable/clickable, and scrollIntoView follows the knob highlight so you don't have to touch-scroll while turning. (5) /api/wizard/reset now also clears the paired-speaker pairing and speakers[] so re-running setup on an already-paired board doesn't strand the wizard with a stale entry. (6) New 'check_update' action, mapped by default to long-hold (lh) — polls the manifest on demand and OTAs if newer; runs even when no Sonos is paired, so a bricked pairing can self-recover.
